title: Q9UKR3-Protease-Human-Paralogs
h2:caption: Q9UKR3-Protease-Paralogs
md:info: This page presents the detail results of the **Q9UKR3** **Protease** **Protein**.

page:Q9UKR3.h2:caption: P08217 and Q9Y5K2 Alignment

alnpdb:alignment.info: Aligned P08217 with Q9Y5K2 using by PROTSUB. The alignment with FATCAT tool produces significant similarity with a p-value of 1.44e-15.

page:Q9UKR3.h3:caption: PCs plots
page:Q9UKR3.md:info: The superimposed figures of PC1 and PC2 extremes for two known serine proteases - **P08217:Chymotrypsin-like elastase family member 2A** and **Q9Y5K2:Kallikrein-4**.(Figures below, from left to right: PC1 and PC2 for P08217, PC1 and PC2 for Q9Y5K2)
